description_long: This ornate sconce features a central stem that extends downward from a decorative ceiling mount, branching out into six elegantly curved arms. Each arm supports a lampshade with a flared, faceted design, likely made of glass or crystal, giving the fixture a luxurious and classic appearance. The arms are adorned with subtle scrollwork and gentle curves, contributing to a sense of sophistication and grandeur. The central body is bulbous and faceted, matching the style of the shades and adding visual weight to the fixture. The overall design is symmetrical, with the arms radiating evenly around the central axis. The sconce is designed to be suspended from the ceiling, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors or grand entryways.
description: A luxurious, multi-arm ceiling sconce with six faceted glass or crystal shades and ornate scrollwork, suspended from a decorative ceiling mount. The design is symmetrical and exudes classic elegance.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six arms and shades radiating symmetrically from the central stem, with the decorative ceiling mount visible above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the arms and the layered arrangement of the shades, with three shades visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the arms and shades, and the central faceted body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the curvature of the arms and the profile of the shades.
attribute_fixture_design: Classic and ornate, with faceted glass or crystal shades and elegant scrollwork arms, evoking a vintage or traditional chandelier style.
